description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and blue exterior walls, surrounded by a fenced yard. The front features a covered porch with white columns, a driveway leading to a three-car garage, and a manicured lawn. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area, outdoor seating, and a swimming pool, partially shaded by mature trees. Multiple dormer windows punctuate the roof, providing natural light to the upper floor. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped and others standalone. The property is bordered by a wooden fence and includes landscaping elements such as shrubs and flower beds.
description: A large, blue two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, three-car garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio, all surrounded by a wooden fence and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, three-car garage, driveway, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the expanse of the fenced yard with trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a patio, outdoor seating, swimming pool, and mature trees providing shade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, patio, and the side of the house with additional landscaping and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with dormer and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps leading to a single main door, and decorative trim
